metadata.title: Deep RFC-4180 import/export + idempotent upsert (SDK 2026.5.31)
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: RFC-4180 parser handles quotes/escapes/embedded-newlines/CRLF/BOM; --delimiter and TSV work; --map col=field remaps headers; --key enables upsert via csv-key provenance tag; --no-header / --crlf on export; heavy edge-case tests; functional round-trip on messy real data; all CI checks green.
metadata.value: Make pm-csv a robust, round-trip-faithful CSV bridge: full RFC-4180 import/export, BOM handling, configurable delimiter (CSV/TSV), header-to-field mapping, type coercion, idempotent upsert keyed on a column, and header control on export.
metadata.outcome: pm csv import/export survives quotes, embedded newlines, unicode, BOM, TSV; re-import is idempotent (no duplicates) when --key is given; round-trip diff is clean.

metadata.title: Hands-on functional test pass 2026-05-29 (real data)
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: All three bugs fixed, rebuilt, re-tested green. pm-csv functional pass complete.

metadata.title: Command handlers threw plain Error (no exitCode) → runtime double-invocation
metadata.description: csv import/export threw plain Error without numeric exitCode; pm's runCommandHandler then falls through its unhandled path and re-invokes the handler a second time, exiting with a generic code. Added dependency-free CommandError mirroring SDK EXIT_CODE; missing-arg=2, missing-file=3 (ENOENT), other failures=1; single invocation.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed: CommandError carries exitCode. Verified full functionality — round-trip import/export works, error paths exit 2/3/1 with single invocation.

metadata.title: Export --excel/--crlf wrote a lone LF as the final line terminator
metadata.description: buildCsvExport joins records with CRLF for --excel/--crlf, but both write sites appended a hardcoded '\n', so the FINAL record ended in a lone LF while all others ended CRLF — mixed line endings that break the strict-CRLF promise of --excel (RFC 4180 / Excel).
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: --excel/--crlf output is uniformly CRLF incl. the trailing terminator (no lone LF); default (LF) export unchanged; build+tests green

metadata.title: csv import/export return error object instead of throwing (exit 0 on failure)
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Replaced return {error} with throw in import+export handlers. Verified missing-file/no-title/no-arg all exit 1.

metadata.title: csv export drops body (no --include-body) and uses nonexistent due_date/milestone create flags
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Added --include-body to export; switched to deadline column mapped to --deadline; dropped invalid --milestone flag. Round-trip verified.

metadata.title: csv import --dry-run silently ignored (still writes)
metadata.author: codex
metadata.close_reason: Fixed via readBoolOption helper reading both dry-run and dryRun. Verified dry-run writes nothing (before=3 after=3).

metadata.description: Prepare pm-csv as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

metadata.title: Add publish retry + provenance fallback to release workflow
metadata.description: Replace the npm publish step in .github/workflows/release.yml with a resilient version that (1) skips if the version is already published, (2) retries up to 3 times with 30s sleep, and (3) falls back to publishing without --provenance after persistent registry 404s. Permanent fix for the 2026-05-27 npm E404 outage that left all 19 packages tagged in git but unpublished on npm.
metadata.author: codex

metadata.close_reason: Swapped changelog generation before release checks so changelog:check sees updated file. Verified workflow dispatch then triggers npm publish + GH release.
